title: medicago doliata var. muricata
intro: Medicago doliata var. muricata, also known as the bitter medick or bitter lucerne, is a perennial legume that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Medicago doliata var. muricata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
